name: GMI Cloud
description: GMI Cloud — GPU-focused cloud platform targeting AI inference and model training with H100 and A100 cluster access.

seo.title: GMI Cloud — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: GMI Cloud: GMI Cloud — GPU-focused cloud platform targeting AI inference and model training with H100 and A100 cluster access.

when_to_use: AI inference and training on H100/A100 GPU clusters
Cost-effective GPU compute for LLM fine-tuning workloads
Managed GPU cloud for ML teams avoiding hyperscaler costs
Training diffusion and language models on dedicated hardware
Burst GPU capacity for deep learning research projects

pros: Direct access to H100 and A100 clusters
Focus on AI inference and training
cons: Tooling and services narrower than AWS
review.verdict: A credible specialist GPU cloud for AI teams prioritizing price and availability over breadth.
review.best_for: AI startups training or serving models on H100 and A100
review.not_for: Teams needing databases, queues, and a full managed cloud

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage-based metering; scales with consumption, no explicit peak-lock.
